PR surface: Source +33. Total +33 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR is an internal refactor rather than a bug report. Behavior preservation is covered by source parity review and the existing focused ACP runtime-handle tests listed in the PR body.

target.title: refactor: extract ACP manager runtime handle cache
target.body:
## Summary

- Extract ACP manager runtime-handle cache ownership into `ManagerRuntimeHandleCache`
- Move cached handle matching, status reuse checks, close/clear, observability, and idle eviction out of `manager.core.ts`
- Keep `AcpSessionManager` focused on session orchestration and runtime lifecycle decisions

## Verification

Behavior addressed: internal ACP manager refactor only; no protocol or user-visible behavior change intended.
Real environment tested: local macOS checkout, Node/pnpm repo tooling.
Exact steps or command run after this patch:
- `pnpm test src/acp/control-plane/manager.runtime-handles.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/runtime-cache.test.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.runtime-config.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/acp/control-plane/manager.core.ts src/acp/control-plane/manager.runtime-handle-cache.ts`
- `pnpm check:test-types`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
Evidence after fix: focused manager runtime-handle/runtime-config tests passed; narrow oxlint passed; test types passed; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: cached runtime handle reuse, unhealthy-status eviction, handle matching, close/clear, idle eviction, and observability behavior are preserved through the extracted owner.
What was not tested: full CI before PR creation.
target.author: steipete
